Initializes the Emscripten tick timer service.

# Purpose
This code is a C header file that declares a function prototype for [`emx_tick_timer_service_init`](<#emx_tick_timer_service_init>). The function is intended to initialize a tick timer service, which is likely used for time-based operations or scheduling tasks in an embedded system or application. The `#pragma once` directive is used to ensure the header file is included only once during compilation, preventing duplicate definitions. ### emx\_tick\_timer\_service\_init<!-- {{#callable_declaration:emx_tick_timer_service_init}} -->
[View Source →](<../../../../applib-targets/emscripten/emscripten_tick_timer_service.h#L19>)

Initializes the tick timer service.
- **Description**: Use this function to initialize the tick timer service before any other operations on the service. This function must be called once before using any other functions related to the tick timer service to ensure proper setup and avoid undefined behavior. It does not take any parameters and does not return any value.
- **Inputs**: None
- **Output**: None
- **See Also**: [`emx_tick_timer_service_init`](<emscripten_tick_timer_service.c.md#emx_tick_timer_service_init>)  (Implementation)
